arts.ttl: The nine days that reduced Arsenal's season to a crumpled mess: Injuries, impotence and the one glaring problem that has left Mikel Arteta facing serious questions
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: As a stretcher collected an injured Gabriel Jesus off the Emirates turf, you half-expected it to stop and retrieve the further remnants of Arsenal 's crumbling campaign, too.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer pinpoints three Man Utd stars for special praise after Arsenal win
arts.sum: Manchester United squeezed past Premier League rivals Arsenal to reach the fourth round of the FA Cup and Alan Shearer was left impressed with three Red Devils stars in particular

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'leading race' for £40m Ben Chilwell replacement as Arsenal, Real Madrid suffer setback
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly steal a march on Real Madrid and Arsenal in the race to sign 18-year-old Ajax defender Jorrel Hato, who is valued at £40m.

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz's wife reveals sickening Instagram messages as Arsenal launch investigation
arts.sum: Kai Havertz missed the decisive penalty during Arsenal’s FA Cup defeat to Manchester United and his wife has been targeted by vile trolls in the aftermath of the Gunners’ elimination

arts.ttl: Arsenal star was banned from taking penalty in Man Utd shootout due to little-known rule
arts.sum: Arsenal were ousted from the FA Cup by Manchester United on penalties after Kai Havertz’s miss but the Gunners' chances were hit with a blow after one star was prevented from taking a spot-kick

arts.ttl: Manuel Ugarte could face ban for Kai Havertz 'headbutt' in Arsenal vs Man Utd brawl
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte appeared to headbutt Kai Havertz as Manchester United beat Arsenal in the FA Cup third round and the Red Devils midfielder could be banned as a result

arts.ttl: Amorim 'doesn't know' if Rashford has played last Man Utd game
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim casts further doubt on Marcus Rashford's future after his exclusion from Sunday's squad for the FA Cup third-round victory over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals the vital change his Man United side made during FA Cup win over Arsenal compared to their defeat in December - and hails the 'hero' behind their 'suffering' victory
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES STADIUM: Man United played with 10 men from 61 minutes after Diogo Dalot received a second yellow card for a challenge on Mikel Merino.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Concern for Arsenal attack while Amorim's Man Utd impress
arts.sum: Jamie Weir and Sam Blitz provide the verdict from a classic FA Cup match where Manchester United went through on penalties after Arsenal missed several big chances.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Want to Sign 'The New Gyokeres' for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United are eyeing a move for 'the new Gyokeres' as they look to bolster Ruben Amorim's attacking options.
